briefdescription.para: SJA1000 specific static initializer for a minimum can_timing struct.
SJA1000 specific static initializer for a maximum can_timing struct.
Static initializer for can_sja1000_config struct.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier
Pointer to custom driver frontend configuration structure
Driver frontend SJA100 register read function
Driver frontend SJA100 register write function
Initial SJA1000 Output Control Register (OCR) value
Initial SJA1000 Clock Divider Register (CDR) value
minimum bitrate supported by the CAN controller

briefdescription.para: Static initializer for can_sja1000_config struct from a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number
Pointer to custom driver frontend configuration structure
Driver frontend SJA100 register read function
Driver frontend SJA100 register write function
Initial SJA1000 Output Control Register (OCR) value
Initial SJA1000 Clock Divider Register (CDR) value
minimum bitrate supported by the CAN controller

briefdescription.para: Initializer for a can_sja1000_data struct.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to custom driver frontend data structure

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* can_sja1000_write_reg_t) (const struct device *dev, uint8_t reg, uint8_t val)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint8_t reg, uint8_t val)
memberdef.name: can_sja1000_write_reg_t

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 driver front-end callback for writing a register value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Register offset
Register value

memberdef.definition: typedef uint8_t(* can_sja1000_read_reg_t) (const struct device *dev, uint8_t reg)
memberdef.name: can_sja1000_read_reg_t

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 driver front-end callback for reading a register value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Register offset
value

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 callback API upon setting CAN bus timing See can_set_timing() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon getting CAN controller capabilities See can_get_capabilities() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon starting CAN controller See can_start() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon stopping CAN controller See can_stop() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon setting CAN controller mode See can_set_mode() for argument description.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct can_frame *frame, k_timeout_t timeout, can_tx_callback_t callback, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: can_sja1000_send

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 callback API upon sending a CAN frame See can_send() for argument description.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, can_rx_callback_t callback, void *user_data, const struct can_filter *filter)
memberdef.name: can_sja1000_add_rx_filter

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 callback API upon adding an RX filter See can_add_rx_callback() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon removing an RX filter See can_remove_rx_filter() for argument description.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum can_state *state, struct can_bus_err_cnt *err_cnt)
memberdef.name: can_sja1000_get_state

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 callback API upon getting the CAN controller state See can_get_state() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon setting a state change callback See can_set_state_change_callback() for argument description.
SJA1000 callback API upon getting the maximum number of concurrent CAN RX filters See can_get_max_filters() for argument description.
SJA1000 IRQ handler callback.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: SJA1000 driver initialization callback.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

briefdescription.para: API for NXP SJA1000 (and compatible) CAN controller frontend drivers.
